carga en la que puedes conectar tu Steam\\u00a0Controller magn\\u00e9ticamente con un clic que da gusto o\\u00edr. \\u00bfPrefieres usar Bluetooth o USB? Steam Controller inclui sticks magn\\u00e9ticos que usam a tecnologia TMR, criados para oferecer uma melhor sensa\\u00e7\\u00e3o, resposta e fiabilidade a longo prazo. Tamb\\u00e9m disp\\u00f5em de sensores de toque capacitivo para ativar os controlos de movimento.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controller jest wyposa\\u017cony w magnetyczne dr\\u0105\\u017cki korzystaj\\u0105ce z technologii TMR, kt\\u00f3re zosta\\u0142y zaprojektowane pod k\\u0105tem ulepszonych wra\\u017ce\\u0144 dotykowych, reakcji oraz d\\u0142ugotrwa\\u0142ej niezawodno\\u015bci. Obs\\u0142uguj\\u0105 one r\\u00f3wnie\\u017c pojemno\\u015bciowe wykrywanie dotyku, by umo\\u017cliwi\\u0107 sterowanie ruchem.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controller har magnetiske styrepinde, som bruger TMR-teknologi, designet til forbedret f\\u00f8ling, respons og p\\u00e5lidelighed i lang tid. De underst\\u00f8tter ogs\\u00e5 kapacitiv ber\\u00f8ring til aktivering af bev\\u00e6gelsesstyring.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]De Steam Controller is uitgerust met magnetische analoge sticks die gebruikmaken van TMR-technologie, ontworpen voor een beter spelgevoel, snellere reactietijden en langdurige betrouwbaarheid. Daarnaast zijn er capacitieve aanraaksensoren om bewegingsbesturing mogelijk te maken.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controller -ohjaimessa on TMR-teknologiaa k\\u00e4ytt\\u00e4v\\u00e4t magneettiset ohjainsauvat, jotka on suunniteltu mukavuutta, responsiivisuutta ja pitk\\u00e4aikaista kest\\u00e4vyytt\\u00e4 ajatellen. Ne tukevat my\\u00f6s kapasitiivista kosketusta, jolla liikeohjaus otetaan k\\u00e4ytt\\u00f6\\u00f6n.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controller har magnetiske styrespaker, som bruker TMR-teknologi, designet for forbedret f\\u00f8lelse, respons og langsiktig p\\u00e5litelighet. De st\\u00f8tter ogs\\u00e5 kapasitiv ber\\u00f8ring for \\u00e5 aktivere bevegelsesstyring.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controller levereras med magnetiska styrspakar som anv\\u00e4nder TMR-teknologi, designat f\\u00f6r att ge f\\u00f6rb\\u00e4ttrad k\\u00e4nsla, respons och l\\u00e5ngsiktig h\\u00e5llbarhet. De st\\u00f6der ocks\\u00e5 kapacitiv ber\\u00f6ring f\\u00f6r att aktivera r\\u00f6relsekontroll.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]A Steam Controller TMR-technol\\u00f3gi\\u00e1t haszn\\u00e1l\\u00f3 m\\u00e1gneses ir\\u00e1ny\\u00edt\\u00f3karokkal rendelkezik, amelyeket a jobb \\u00e9rzet, v\\u00e1laszid\\u0151 \\u00e9s hossz\\u00fa t\\u00e1v\\u00fa megb\\u00edzhat\\u00f3s\\u00e1g \\u00e9rdek\\u00e9ben tervezt\\u00fcnk. A kapacit\\u00edv \\u00e9rz\\u00e9kel\\u00e9st is t\\u00e1mogatj\\u00e1k a mozg\\u00e1svez\\u00e9rl\\u00e9s lehet\\u0151v\\u00e9 t\\u00e9tel\\u00e9hez.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Ovlada\\u010d Steam Controller disponuje magnetick\\u00fdmi p\\u00e1\\u010dkami s technologi\\u00ed TMR, kter\\u00e9 byly navr\\u017eeny pro lep\\u0161\\u00ed hern\\u00ed z\\u00e1\\u017eitek, odezvu a spolehlivost. Co v\\u00edc, kapacitn\\u00ed dotykov\\u00e9 senzory p\\u00e1\\u010dek jsou skv\\u011bl\\u00e9 pro ovl\\u00e1d\\u00e1n\\u00ed gyroskopu.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controller dispune de stickuri analogice magnetice cu tehnologie TMR, concepute pentru a oferi o senza\\u021bie \\u0219i un timp de r\\u0103spuns \\u00eembun\\u0103t\\u0103\\u021bite \\u0219i o fiabilitate durabil\\u0103. De asemenea, senzorii tactili capacitivi ai acestora permit utilizarea comenzilor de mi\\u0219care.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controller, daha iyi his, tepki s\\u00fcresi ve uzun vadeli dayan\\u0131kl\\u0131l\\u0131k i\\u00e7in TMR teknolojisini kullanan manyetik analog \\u00e7ubuklara sahiptir. Ayr\\u0131ca hareket kontrollerini etkinle\\u015ftirmek i\\u00e7in kapasitif dokunma da desteklenir.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]O Steam Controller vem com alavancas magn\\u00e9ticas que usam a tecnologia TMR, projetadas para oferecer uma melhor sensa\\u00e7\\u00e3o, resposta e confiabilidade a longo prazo. They also support capacitive touch to enable motion controls. [\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Der Steam Controller verf\\u00fcgt \\u00fcber magnetische Analogsticks mit TMR-Technologie, die eine verbesserte Empfindlichkeit, Reaktionsfreudigkeit und langfristige Zuverl\\u00e4ssigkeit garantieren. Die kapazitive Touchfunktion erm\\u00f6glicht eine zus\\u00e4tzliche Steuerung von Bewegungen. [\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Le Steam\\u00a0Controller est dot\\u00e9 de joysticks magn\\u00e9tiques qui utilisent la technologie\\u00a0TMR, con\\u00e7ue pour offrir de meilleures sensations, une r\\u00e9activit\\u00e9 am\\u00e9lior\\u00e9e et une fiabilit\\u00e9 \\u00e0 long terme. Ils prennent \\u00e9galement en charge la d\\u00e9tection capacitive pour activer le contr\\u00f4le du mouvement. [\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controller \\u00e8 dotato di levette magnetiche che fanno ricorso alla tecnologia TMR, sviluppata per offrire una migliore percezione tattile, una maggiore reattivit\\u00e0 e un'affidabilit\\u00e0 di lunga durata. Le levette supportano anche il touch capacitivo per abilitare i controlli di movimento. [\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]O Steam Controller inclui sticks magn\\u00e9ticos que usam a tecnologia TMR, criados para oferecer uma melhor Tamb\\u00e9m disp\\u00f5em de sensores de toque capacitivo para ativar os controlos de movimento. [\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controller jest wyposa\\u017cony w magnetyczne dr\\u0105\\u017cki korzystaj\\u0105ce z technologii TMR, kt\\u00f3re zosta\\u0142y zaprojektowane pod k\\u0105tem ulepszonych wra\\u017ce\\u0144 dotykowych, reakcji oraz d\\u0142ugotrwa\\u0142ej niezawodno\\u015bci. Obs\\u0142uguj\\u0105 one r\\u00f3wnie\\u017c pojemno\\u015bciowe wykrywanie dotyku, by umo\\u017cliwi\\u0107 sterowanie ruchem. [\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controller har magnetiske styrepinde, som bruger TMR-teknologi, designet til forbedret f\\u00f8ling, respons og p\\u00e5lidelighed i lang tid. De underst\\u00f8tter ogs\\u00e5 kapacitiv ber\\u00f8ring til aktivering af bev\\u00e6gelsesstyring. [\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]De Steam Controller is uitgerust met magnetische analoge sticks die gebruikmaken van TMR-technologie, ontworpen voor een beter spelgevoel, snellere reactietijden en langdurige betrouwbaarheid. Daarnaast zijn er capacitieve aanraaksensoren om bewegingsbesturing mogelijk te maken. [\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controller -ohjaimessa on TMR-teknologiaa k\\u00e4ytt\\u00e4v\\u00e4t magneettiset ohjainsauvat, jotka on suunniteltu mukavuutta, responsiivisuutta ja pitk\\u00e4aikaista kest\\u00e4vyytt\\u00e4 ajatellen. Ne tukevat my\\u00f6s kapasitiivista kosketusta, jolla liikeohjaus otetaan k\\u00e4ytt\\u00f6\\u00f6n. [\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controller har magnetiske styrespaker, som bruker TMR-teknologi, designet for forbedret f\\u00f8lelse, respons og langsiktig p\\u00e5litelighet. De st\\u00f8tter ogs\\u00e5 kapasitiv ber\\u00f8ring for \\u00e5 aktivere bevegelsesstyring. [\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controller levereras med magnetiska styrspakar som anv\\u00e4nder TMR-teknologi, designat f\\u00f6r att ge f\\u00f6rb\\u00e4ttrad k\\u00e4nsla, respons och l\\u00e5ngsiktig h\\u00e5llbarhet. De st\\u00f6der ocks\\u00e5 kapacitiv ber\\u00f6ring f\\u00f6r att aktivera r\\u00f6relsekontroll. [\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]A Steam Controller TMR-technol\\u00f3gi\\u00e1t haszn\\u00e1l\\u00f3 m\\u00e1gneses ir\\u00e1ny\\u00edt\\u00f3karokkal rendelkezik, amelyeket a jobb \\u00e9rzet, v\\u00e1laszid\\u0151 \\u00e9s hossz\\u00fa t\\u00e1v\\u00fa megb\\u00edzhat\\u00f3s\\u00e1g \\u00e9rdek\\u00e9ben tervezt\\u00fcnk. A kapacit\\u00edv \\u00e9rz\\u00e9kel\\u00e9st is t\\u00e1mogatj\\u00e1k a mozg\\u00e1svez\\u00e9rl\\u00e9s lehet\\u0151v\\u00e9 t\\u00e9tel\\u00e9hez. [\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Ovlada\\u010d Steam Controller disponuje magnetick\\u00fdmi p\\u00e1\\u010dkami s technologi\\u00ed TMR, kter\\u00e9 byly navr\\u017eeny pro lep\\u0161\\u00ed hern\\u00ed z\\u00e1\\u017eitek, odezvu a spolehlivost. Co v\\u00edc, kapacitn\\u00ed dotykov\\u00e9 senzory p\\u00e1\\u010dek jsou skv\\u011bl\\u00e9 pro ovl\\u00e1d\\u00e1n\\u00ed gyroskopu. [\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controller dispune de stickuri analogice magnetice cu tehnologie TMR, concepute pentru a oferi o senza\\u021bie \\u0219i un timp de r\\u0103spuns \\u00eembun\\u0103t\\u0103\\u021bite \\u0219i o fiabilitate durabil\\u0103. De asemenea, senzorii tactili capacitivi ai acestora permit utilizarea comenzilor de mi\\u0219care. [\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controller, daha iyi his, tepki s\\u00fcresi ve uzun vadeli dayan\\u0131kl\\u0131l\\u0131k i\\u00e7in TMR teknolojisini kullanan manyetik analog \\u00e7ubuklara sahiptir. Ayr\\u0131ca hareket kontrollerini etkinle\\u015ftirmek i\\u00e7in kapasitif dokunma da desteklenir. [\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]O Steam Controller vem com alavancas magn\\u00e9ticas que usam a tecnologia TMR, projetadas para oferecer uma melhor sensa\\u00e7\\u00e3o, resposta e confiabilidade a longo prazo. Elas tamb\\u00e9m s\\u00e3o sens\\u00edveis ao toque, assim voc\\u00ea pode ativar o girosc\\u00f3pio facilmente. Tambi\\u00e9n son sensibles al tacto, por lo que puedes activar f\\u00e1cilmente el giroscopio. [\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controller \\u0111i k\\u00e8m c\\u1ea7n tr\\u1ecf t\\u1eeb t\\u00ednh d\\u00f9ng c\\u00f4ng ngh\\u1ec7 TMR, nh\\u1eb1m c\\u1ea3i thi\\u1ec7n tr\\u1ea3i nghi\\u1ec7m, \\u0111\\u1ed9 ph\\u1ea3n h\\u1ed3i v\\u00e0 \\u1ed5n \\u0111\\u1ecbnh l\\u00e2u d\\u00e0i. C\\u1ea7n tr\\u1ecf c\\u0169ng h\\u1ed7 tr\\u1ee3 c\\u1ea3m \\u1ee9ng \\u0111i\\u1ec7n dung \\u0111\\u1ec3 cho ph\\u00e9p \\u0111i\\u1ec1u khi\\u1ec3n chuy\\u1ec3n \\u0111\\u1ed9ng. [\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,null,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controller hadir dengan thumbstick magnetik yang menggunakan teknologi TMR, didesain untuk meningkatan rasa, tingkat keresponsifan, dan keandalan jangka panjang. Thumbstick magnetik ini juga mendukung sentuhan kapasitif untuk mengaktifkan kontrol gerakan. sensores nas empunhaduras s\\u00e3o uma nova funcionalidade do Steam Controller que permite ativar o girosc\\u00f3pio apenas com toque capacitivo. Tamb\\u00e9m podes configur\\u00e1-los como qualquer outro bot\\u00e3o.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Nazywamy to czujnikiem chwytu i jest to nowy element wej\\u015bcia dla Steam Controllera, kt\\u00f3ry umo\\u017cliwia dzia\\u0142anie \\u017cyroskopu z dotykiem pojemno\\u015bciowym. Przytrzymaj i zwolnij, by w\\u0142\\u0105czy\\u0107 i wy\\u0142\\u0105czy\\u0107 celowanie \\u017cyroskopem. Mo\\u017cesz tak\\u017ce skonfigurowa\\u0107 go jak ka\\u017cdy inny przycisk.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Vi kalder det Grip Sense, og det er et nyt input til Steam Controller, som aktiverer gyroskopet med kapacitiv ber\\u00f8ring. Hold og giv slip for at aktivere og deaktivere gyroskopets sigtefunktion. Du kan ogs\\u00e5 tilknytte det til en knap.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Maak kennis met Grip Sense, een nieuwe invoer voor Steam Controller die de gyroscoop inschakelt met behulp van capacitieve aanraking. Door vasthouden en loslaten kun je richten met de gyroscoop in- en uitschakelen. Je kunt ook functies toewijzen net als voor elke andere knop.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam Controllerille on uusi sy\\u00f6tetapa nimelt\\u00e4 kahvasensori, jolla gyro otetaan k\\u00e4ytt\\u00f6\\u00f6n kapasitiivisella kosketuksella. Ota gyrot\\u00e4ht\\u00e4ys k\\u00e4ytt\\u00f6\\u00f6n tai pois k\\u00e4yt\\u00f6st\\u00e4 pit\\u00e4m\\u00e4ll\\u00e4 sormea kosketuspinnalla tai vapauttamalla se. Gyron aktivoinnin voi my\\u00f6s m\\u00e4\\u00e4ritt\\u00e4\\u00e4 mille tahansa muulle painikkeelle.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Vi kaller det grepsensor, og det er en ny inndata for Steam Controller som kan aktivere gyroen med kapasitiv ber\\u00f8ring. Hold og slipp for \\u00e5 aktivere og deaktivere sikting med gyroskopet. Du kan ogs\\u00e5 tilordne den som en hvilken som helst annen knapp.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Vi kallar det f\\u00f6r Grip Sense och det \\u00e4r en ny inmatning f\\u00f6r Steam Controller som aktiverar gyroskopet med kapacitiv ber\\u00f6ring. H\\u00e5ll och sl\\u00e4pp f\\u00f6r att aktivera och inaktivera siktning med gyroskopet. Tartsd lenyomva vagy engedd el a giroszk\\u00f3pos c\\u00e9lz\\u00e1s be- \\u00e9s kikapcsol\\u00e1s\\u00e1hoz. tamanhos.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;rgb(27, 27, 27)\\\&quot;]Steam Controller zosta\\u0142 stworzony dla wygody podczas d\\u0142ugich sesji grania, a rozmieszczenie rozmiarze.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;rgb(27, 27, 27)\\\&quot;]Steam Controller er bygget til behagelige, lange spilsessioner, med styrepinde, knapper og aftr\\u00e6kkere til h\\u00e6nder i alle st\\u00f8rrelser.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;rgb(27, 27, 27)\\\&quot;]De Steam Controller is ontworpen met het oog op comfort tijdens langdurige spelsessies. De analoge sticks, knoppen, bumpers en trekkers zijn ideaal gepositioneerd voor zowel grote als kleine handen.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;rgb(27, 27, 27)\\\&quot;]Steam Controller on luotu pitki\\u00e4 pelisessioita varten. Sen ohjainsauvojen, painikkeiden, olkapainikkeiden ja liipaisimien sijoittelu sopii kaiken kokoisille k\\u00e4sille.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;rgb(27, 27, 27)\\\&quot;]Steam Controller er bygget for behagelige og lange spill\\u00f8kter, med styrespaker, knapper og avtrekkere til hender i alle st\\u00f8rrelser.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;rgb(27, 27, 27)\\\&quot;]Steam Controller \\u00e4r byggd f\\u00f6r bekv\\u00e4ma och l\\u00e5ngvariga spelsessioner, med styrspakar, knappar och avtryckare anpassade f\\u00f6r h\\u00e4nder av alla storlekar.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;rgb(27, 27, 27)\\\&quot;]A Steam Controller k\\u00e9nyelmes hosszabb j\\u00e1t\\u00e9kid\\u0151re k\\u00e9sz\\u00fclt, az ir\\u00e1ny\\u00edt\\u00f3karok, gombok, v\\u00e1llgombok \\u00e9s ravaszok minden k\\u00e9zm\\u00e9rethez illeszkednek.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;rgb(27, 27, 27)\\\&quot;]Ovlada\\u010d Steam Controller je uzp\\u016fsoben pro komfort, tak\\u017ee p\\u00e1\\u010dky, tla\\u010d\\u00edtka, n\\u00e1razn\\u00edky a spou\\u0161t\\u011b jsou pohodln\\u011b p\\u0159\\u00edstupn\\u00e9 i hr\\u00e1\\u010d\\u016fm s men\\u0161\\u00edma rukama.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;rgb(27, 27, 27)\\\&quot;]Steam Controller este conceput s\\u0103 ofere o experien\\u021b\\u0103 de joc confortabil\\u0103 pentru sesiunile \\u00eendelungate, cu stickuri analogice, butoane, bumpere \\u0219i triggere atent pozi\\u021bionate pentru m\\u00e2ini de toate dimensiunile.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;rgb(27, 27, 27)\\\&quot;]Steam Controller, konforlu bir \\u015fekilde uzun s\\u00fcre oyun oynamak i\\u00e7in tasarland\\u0131. on the trackpads or thumbsticks.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Sie entscheiden, wie Sie die vier Tasten auf der R\\u00fcckseite nutzen m\\u00f6chten, joysticks.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Quattro pulsanti sul retro: sei tu a decidere come usarli, mentre i pollici sono sui trackpad o sulle quatro bot\\u00f5es traseiros e podes escolher como preferes us\\u00e1-los, sem teres de tirar os polegares dos trackpads ou sticks.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Cztery przyciski z ty\\u0142u i to ty wybierasz, jak ich u\\u017cywa\\u0107. Wszystko to, zostawiaj\\u0105c swoje kciuki na panelach dotykowych lub dr\\u0105\\u017ckach.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Fire knapper bagp\\u00e5 \\u2013 du v\\u00e6lger, hvordan du vil bruge dem, uden at flytte tommelfingrene fra trackpadene eller styrepindene.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Vier knoppen op de achterkant en jij bepaalt hoe je ze wil gebruiken. Alle controle, zonder dat je je duimen van de trackpads of analoge sticks hoeft te halen.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Ohjaimen takaosassa on nelj\\u00e4 painiketta. Voit m\\u00e4\\u00e4ritt\\u00e4\\u00e4 niiden sy\\u00f6tteen ja k\\u00e4ytt\\u00e4\\u00e4 niit\\u00e4 joutumatta liikuttamaan peukaloitasi kosketuslevyilt\\u00e4 tai ohjainsauvoilta.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Fire knapper p\\u00e5 baksiden, og du velger hvordan du vil bruke dem, uten \\u00e5 m\\u00e5tte flytte tomlene til styreplatene eller styrespakene.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Fyra knappar p\\u00e5 baksidan. Du v\\u00e4ljer hur du vill anv\\u00e4nda dem, utan att flytta tummarna fr\\u00e5n styrplattorna eller styrspakarna.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]N\\u00e9gy gomb h\\u00e1tul; a haszn\\u00e1latukat te v\\u00e1laszthatod ki, mik\\u00f6zben a h\\u00fcvelykujjaidat a trackpadeken vagy az ir\\u00e1ny\\u00edt\\u00f3karokon hagyod.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Na zadn\\u00ed stran\\u011b ovlada\\u010de se nach\\u00e1z\\u00ed \\u010dty\\u0159i tla\\u010d\\u00edtka, kter\\u00fdm Alle controle, zonder dat je je duimen van de trackpads of analoge sticks hoeft te halen.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Ohjaimen takaosassa on nelj\\u00e4 painiketta. Voit m\\u00e4\\u00e4ritt\\u00e4\\u00e4 niiden sy\\u00f6tteen ja k\\u00e4ytt\\u00e4\\u00e4 niit\\u00e4 joutumatta liikuttamaan peukaloitasi kosketuslevyilt\\u00e4 tai ohjainsauvoilta.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Fire knapper p\\u00e5 baksiden, og du velger hvordan du vil bruke dem, uten \\u00e5 m\\u00e5tte flytte tomlene til styreplatene eller styrespakene.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Fyra knappar p\\u00e5 baksidan. Du v\\u00e4ljer hur du vill anv\\u00e4nda dem, utan att flytta tummarna fr\\u00e5n styrplattorna eller styrspakarna.[\\\/color][\\\/p][p][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]N\\u00e9gy gomb h\\u00e1tul; a haszn\\u00e1latukat te v\\u00e1laszthatod ki, mik\\u00f6zben a Optionen.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Le bouton\\u00a0Steam, c'est \\u00e0 la fois le bouton de marche\\\/arr\\u00eat\\u00a0[i]et[\\\/i] le moyen le plus rapide navigeren.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam-painike toimii sek\\u00e4 k\\u00e4ynnistyspainikkeena ett\\u00e4 pikan\\u00e4pp\\u00e4imen\\u00e4, jolla p\\u00e4\\u00e4see kirjastoon, kauppaan, ohjainm\\u00e4\\u00e4rityksiin, asetuksiin ja muualle.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam-knappen er b\\u00e5de av\\\/p\\u00e5-knappen [i]og[\\\/i] den raskeste m\\u00e5te \\u00e5 g\\u00e5 til biblioteket, butikken, spillkontrollere, innstillinger og mer.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam-knappen \\u00e4r b\\u00e5de str\\u00f6mknapp\\u00a0[i]och[\\\/i] det snabbaste s\\u00e4ttet att navigera till ditt bibliotek, butiken, spelkontroller, inst\\u00e4llningar och mer.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]A Steam gomb a bekapcsol\\u00f3gomb, [i]\\u00e9s[\\\/i] egyben a leggyorsabb m\\u00f3d a K\\u00f6nyvt\\u00e1rad, az \\u00c1ruh\\u00e1z, a j\\u00e1t\\u00e9kbeli vez\\u00e9rl\\u00e9s, a be\\u00e1ll\\u00edt\\u00e1sok \\u00e9s egyebek nejrychlej\\u0161\\u00ed cestou do knihovny, obchodu, nastaven\\u00ed ovlada\\u010de a na dal\\u0161\\u00ed d\\u016fle\\u017eit\\u00e1 m\\u00edsta.[\\\/color] [\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Butonul Steam este at\\u00e2t butonul de alimentare,\\u00a0[i]c\\u00e2t \\u0219i[\\\/i] cea mai rapid\\u0103 modalitate de a-\\u021bi accesa biblioteca, magazinul, comenzile de joc, set\\u0103rile \\u0219i multe altele.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam butonu hem g\\u00fc\\u00e7 butonu\\u00a0[i]hem navigeren.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam-painike toimii sek\\u00e4 k\\u00e4ynnistyspainikkeena ett\\u00e4 pikan\\u00e4pp\\u00e4imen\\u00e4, jolla p\\u00e4\\u00e4see kirjastoon, kauppaan, ohjainm\\u00e4\\u00e4rityksiin, asetuksiin ja muualle.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam-knappen er b\\u00e5de av\\\/p\\u00e5-knappen [i]og[\\\/i] den raskeste m\\u00e5te \\u00e5 g\\u00e5 til biblioteket, butikken, spillkontrollere, innstillinger og mer.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam-knappen \\u00e4r b\\u00e5de str\\u00f6mknapp\\u00a0[i]och[\\\/i] det snabbaste s\\u00e4ttet att navigera till ditt bibliotek, butiken, spelkontroller, inst\\u00e4llningar och mer.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]A Steam gomb a bekapcsol\\u00f3gomb, [i]\\u00e9s[\\\/i] egyben a leggyorsabb m\\u00f3d a K\\u00f6nyvt\\u00e1rad, az \\u00c1ruh\\u00e1z, a j\\u00e1t\\u00e9kbeli vez\\u00e9rl\\u00e9s, a be\\u00e1ll\\u00edt\\u00e1sok \\u00e9s egyebek el\\u00e9r\\u00e9s\\u00e9hez.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Tla\\u010d\\u00edtko Steam je zap\\u00ednac\\u00edm tla\\u010d\\u00edtkem [i]a\\u00a0tak\\u00e9[\\\/i] nejrychlej\\u0161\\u00ed cestou do knihovny, obchodu, nastaven\\u00ed ovlada\\u010de a na dal\\u0161\\u00ed d\\u016fle\\u017eit\\u00e1 m\\u00edsta.[\\\/color] [\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Butonul Steam este at\\u00e2t butonul de alimentare,\\u00a0[i]c\\u00e2t \\u0219i[\\\/i] cea mai rapid\\u0103 modalitate de a-\\u021bi accesa biblioteca, magazinul, comenzile de joc, set\\u0103rile \\u0219i multe altele.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]Steam butonu hem g\\u00fc\\u00e7 butonu\\u00a0[i]hem de[\\\/i] k\\u00fct\\u00fcphaneye, ma\\u011fazaya, oyun kontrollerine, ayarlara ve daha fazlas\\u0131na gitmenin en h\\u0131zl\\u0131 yoludur.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#000000\\\&quot;]O bot\\u00e3o Steam funciona tanto para (des)ligar\\u00a0[i]quanto[\\\/i] para acessar rapidamente a sua biblioteca, a Paired with Steam Input, it\\u2019s the ultimate customizable controller. Thanks to its input parity with Steam Deck, Steam Controller will be pre-populated with community configurations for thousands of games from day one, or you can make and share your own. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Der Steam Controller wurde mit allen Eingabearten f\\u00fcr alle Ihre Spiele entworfen. In Verbindung mit der Steam-Eingabe ist er der ultimativ anpassbare Controller. Dank seiner Kompatibilit\\u00e4t mit den Eingabearten des Steam Deck profitiert der Steam Controller von Beginn an von den Community-Konfigurationen f\\u00fcr Tausende Spiele. Sie k\\u00f6nnen nat\\u00fcrlich auch Ihre eigenen Konfigurationen erstellen und teilen. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Le Steam\\u00a0Controller a \\u00e9t\\u00e9 con\\u00e7u avec toutes les entr\\u00e9es pour tous vos jeux. Associ\\u00e9 \\u00e0 Steam\\u00a0Input, c'est le contr\\u00f4leur personnalisable par excellence. Gr\\u00e2ce \\u00e0 sa compatibilit\\u00e9 avec Steam\\u00a0Deck, le Steam\\u00a0Controller sera pr\\u00e9configur\\u00e9 avec des configurations cr\\u00e9\\u00e9es par la communaut\\u00e9 pour des milliers de jeux d\\u00e8s le premier jour, et vous pourrez \\u00e9galement cr\\u00e9er et partager les v\\u00f4tres. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller \\u00e8 stato progettato con tutti gli input necessari per tutti i tuoi giochi. Abbinato a Steam Input, \\u00e8 il controller personalizzabile definitivo. Grazie allo stesso numero di input di Steam Deck, per Steam Controller saranno disponibili sin dal primo giorno le configurazioni create dalla Comunit\\u00e0 per migliaia di giochi. In alternativa, puoi creare e condividere la tua configurazione. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]O Steam Controller foi criado com todos os controlos que precisas para todos os teus jogos. Juntamente com o Steam Input, \\u00e9 o comando mais personaliz\\u00e1vel de sempre. Gra\\u00e7as \\u00e0 sua paridade de input com o Steam Deck, o Steam Controller conta com configura\\u00e7\\u00f5es comunit\\u00e1rias para milhares de jogos desde o primeiro dia. Ou ent\\u00e3o, cria as tuas pr\\u00f3prias configura\\u00e7\\u00f5es e partilha-as. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller zosta\\u0142 zaprojektowany z my\\u015bl\\u0105 o wszystkich elementach sterowania dla wszystkich twoich gier. W po\\u0142\\u0105czeniu ze Steam Input to najlepszy mo\\u017cliwy kontroler pod wzgl\\u0119dem personalizacji. Dzi\\u0119ki swojej zgodno\\u015bci ze Steam Deckiem na Steam Controllerze b\\u0119d\\u0105 natychmiastowo dost\\u0119pne konfiguracje od spo\\u0142eczno\\u015bci dla tysi\\u0119cy gier. Mo\\u017cesz te\\u017c bez problemu tworzy\\u0107 i udost\\u0119pnia\\u0107 swoje w\\u0142asne. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller er designet med alle input til alle dine spil. Sammen med Steam Input er det den ultimative brugerdefinerbare controller. Takket v\\u00e6re inputparitet med Steam Deck leveres Steam Controller med f\\u00e6llesskabskonfigurationer til tusindvis af spil fra f\\u00f8rste dag, eller du kan lave og dele dine egne. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]De Steam Controller is ontworpen om je alle invoeropties voor al je spellen te bieden. In combinatie met Steam Input is het de ultieme aanpasbare controller. Dankzij de invoerpariteit met Steam Deck zijn de communityconfiguraties voor duizenden spellen vanaf het eerste gebruik al beschikbaar op de Steam Controller. Natuurlijk kun je ook je eigen configuraties maken en delen. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller on suunniteltu k\\u00e4sittelem\\u00e4\\u00e4n kaikki pelien k\\u00e4ytt\\u00e4m\\u00e4t sy\\u00f6tteet. Yhdess\\u00e4 Steam-sy\\u00f6tteen kanssa se on t\\u00e4ydellinen mukautettava ohjain. Koska Steam Controller toimii samoilla sy\\u00f6tteill\\u00e4 kuin Steam Deck, julkaisup\\u00e4iv\\u00e4n\\u00e4 on heti saatavilla tuhansia peleille valmiiksi luotuja yhteis\\u00f6m\\u00e4\\u00e4rityksi\\u00e4, joiden lis\\u00e4ksi voit luoda ja jakaa omia m\\u00e4\\u00e4rityksi\\u00e4si. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller ble designet med alle slags inndata for alle spill. Sammen med Steam Input er det den ultimate tilpasningsbare kontrolleren. Takket v\\u00e6re inndataparitet med Steam Deck kommer Steam Controller allerede med samfunnskonfigurasjoner for tusenvis av spill fra f\\u00f8rste dag, eller du kan lage og dele dine egne. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller \\u00e4r designad med alla inmatningsmetoder f\\u00f6r alla dina spel. Kombinerat med Steam Input \\u00e4r det den ultimata anpassningsbara kontrollen. Tack vare dess inmatningsparitet med Steam Deck levereras Steam Controller med gemenskapskonfigurationer f\\u00f6r tusentals spel fr\\u00e5n dag ett, eller s\\u00e5 kan du skapa och dela en egen. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]A Steam Controllert az \\u00f6sszes j\\u00e1t\\u00e9kodhoz sz\\u00fcks\\u00e9ges minden bevitellel tervezt\\u00fck. A Steam Bevitellel p\\u00e1ros\\u00edtva ez a legtestreszabhat\\u00f3bb j\\u00e1t\\u00e9kvez\\u00e9rl\\u0151. A Steam Deckkel egyez\\u0151 bevitel\\u00e9nek k\\u00f6sz\\u00f6nhet\\u0151en a Steam Controller az els\\u0151 napt\\u00f3l kezdve el\\u0151re fel lesz t\\u00f6ltve t\\u00f6bb ezer j\\u00e1t\\u00e9k k\\u00f6z\\u00f6ss\\u00e9gi konfigur\\u00e1ci\\u00f3j\\u00e1val, de saj\\u00e1t konfigur\\u00e1ci\\u00f3kat is l\\u00e9trehozhatsz \\u00e9s megoszthatsz. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Ovlada\\u010d Steam Controller m\\u00e1 v\\u0161echny vstupy, kter\\u00e9 by hry mohly vy\\u017eadovat, a ve spojen\\u00ed s\\u00a0rozhran\\u00edm Steam Input se jedn\\u00e1 o \\u0161v\\u00fdcarsk\\u00fd n\\u016f\\u017e mezi gamepady. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller a fost proiectat s\\u0103-\\u021bi ofere toate inputurile necesare pentru toate jocurile tale. \\u00cempreun\\u0103 cu Steam Input, acesta este controlerul suprem \\u00een materie de personalizare. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller, t\\u00fcm oyunlar\\u0131n\\u0131z i\\u00e7in gereken t\\u00fcm girdilere sahip olacak \\u015fekilde tasarlanm\\u0131\\u015ft\\u0131r. Combinado con Steam Input, no existe un control m\\u00e1s personalizable que este. Gracias a la compatibilidad de entrada con el Steam Deck, Steam Controller podr\\u00e1 sacar provecho de configuraciones preexistentes creadas por la comunidad para miles de juegos, o bien podr\\u00e1s crear y compartir tus propias configuraciones. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller \\u0111\\u01b0\\u1ee3c thi\\u1ebft k\\u1ebf v\\u1edbi t\\u1ea5t c\\u1ea3 \\u0111\\u1ea7u v\\u00e0o c\\u1ea7n thi\\u1ebft cho \\u0111\\u1ee7 lo\\u1ea1i tr\\u00f2 ch\\u01a1i. K\\u1ebft h\\u1ee3p c\\u00f9ng Steam Input, \\u0111\\u00e2y s\\u1ebd l\\u00e0 tay c\\u1ea7m c\\u00f3 kh\\u1ea3 n\\u0103ng t\\u00f9y ch\\u1ec9nh t\\u1ed1i \\u01b0u. Nh\\u1edd s\\u1ef1 t\\u01b0\\u01a1ng \\u0111\\u1ed3ng v\\u1ec1 \\u0111\\u1ea7u v\\u00e0o v\\u1edbi Steam Deck, Steam Controller s\\u1ebd c\\u00f3 c\\u00e1c thi\\u1ebft l\\u1eadp \\u0111\\u01b0\\u1ee3c t\\u1ea1o s\\u1eb5n cho h\\u00e0ng ng\\u00e0n tr\\u00f2 ch\\u01a1i ngay t\\u1eeb ng\\u00e0y \\u0111\\u1ea7u, ho\\u1eb7c b\\u1ea1n c\\u0169ng c\\u00f3 th\\u1ec3 t\\u1ef1 t\\u00f9y ch\\u1ec9nh r\\u1ed3i chia s\\u1ebb c\\u00f9ng c\\u1ed9ng \\u0111\\u1ed3ng. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,null,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller didesain dengan semua input untuk semua game milikmu. Dipasangkan dengan Steam Input, ini menjadi kontroler terbaik yang dapat dikustomisasi. Berkat paritas inputnya dengan Steam Deck, Steam Controller menyediakan konfigurasi komunitas untuk ribuan game langsung sejak awal. Atau, kamu dapat membuat dan membagikan konfigurasimu sendiri. Input\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;],\&quot;localized_media_description\&quot;:[\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller was designed with all the inputs for all your games. Paired with Steam Input, it\\u2019s the ultimate customizable controller. Thanks to its input parity with Steam Deck, Steam Controller will be pre-populated with community configurations for thousands of games from day one, or you can make and share your own. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Der Steam Controller wurde mit allen Eingabearten f\\u00fcr alle Ihre Spiele entworfen. In Verbindung mit der Steam-Eingabe ist er der ultimativ anpassbare Controller. Dank seiner Kompatibilit\\u00e4t mit den Eingabearten des Steam Deck profitiert der Steam Controller von Beginn an von den Community-Konfigurationen f\\u00fcr Tausende Spiele. Sie k\\u00f6nnen nat\\u00fcrlich auch Ihre eigenen Konfigurationen erstellen und teilen. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Le Steam\\u00a0Controller a \\u00e9t\\u00e9 con\\u00e7u avec toutes les entr\\u00e9es pour tous vos jeux. Associ\\u00e9 \\u00e0 Steam\\u00a0Input, c'est le contr\\u00f4leur personnalisable par excellence. Gr\\u00e2ce \\u00e0 sa compatibilit\\u00e9 avec Steam\\u00a0Deck, le Steam\\u00a0Controller sera pr\\u00e9configur\\u00e9 avec des configurations cr\\u00e9\\u00e9es par la communaut\\u00e9 pour des milliers de jeux d\\u00e8s le premier jour, et vous pourrez \\u00e9galement cr\\u00e9er et partager les v\\u00f4tres. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller \\u00e8 stato progettato con tutti gli input necessari per tutti i tuoi giochi. Abbinato a Steam Input, \\u00e8 il controller personalizzabile definitivo. Grazie allo stesso numero di input di Steam Deck, per Steam Controller saranno disponibili sin dal primo giorno le configurazioni create dalla Comunit\\u00e0 per migliaia di giochi. In alternativa, puoi creare e condividere la tua configurazione. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]O Steam Controller foi criado com todos os controlos que precisas para todos os teus jogos. Juntamente com o Steam Input, \\u00e9 o comando mais personaliz\\u00e1vel de sempre. Gra\\u00e7as \\u00e0 sua paridade de input com o Steam Deck, o Steam Controller conta com configura\\u00e7\\u00f5es comunit\\u00e1rias para milhares de jogos desde o primeiro dia. Ou ent\\u00e3o, cria as tuas pr\\u00f3prias configura\\u00e7\\u00f5es e partilha-as. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller zosta\\u0142 zaprojektowany z my\\u015bl\\u0105 o wszystkich elementach sterowania dla wszystkich twoich gier. W po\\u0142\\u0105czeniu ze Steam Input to najlepszy mo\\u017cliwy kontroler pod wzgl\\u0119dem personalizacji. Dzi\\u0119ki swojej zgodno\\u015bci ze Steam Deckiem na Steam Controllerze b\\u0119d\\u0105 natychmiastowo dost\\u0119pne konfiguracje od spo\\u0142eczno\\u015bci dla tysi\\u0119cy gier. Mo\\u017cesz te\\u017c bez problemu tworzy\\u0107 i udost\\u0119pnia\\u0107 swoje w\\u0142asne. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller er designet med alle input til alle dine spil. Sammen med Steam Input er det den ultimative brugerdefinerbare controller. Takket v\\u00e6re inputparitet med Steam Deck leveres Steam Controller med f\\u00e6llesskabskonfigurationer til tusindvis af spil fra f\\u00f8rste dag, eller du kan lave og dele dine egne. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]De Steam Controller is ontworpen om je alle invoeropties voor al je spellen te bieden. In combinatie met Steam Input is het de ultieme aanpasbare controller. Dankzij de invoerpariteit met Steam Deck zijn de communityconfiguraties voor duizenden spellen vanaf het eerste gebruik al beschikbaar op de Steam Controller. Natuurlijk kun je ook je eigen configuraties maken en delen. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller on suunniteltu k\\u00e4sittelem\\u00e4\\u00e4n kaikki pelien k\\u00e4ytt\\u00e4m\\u00e4t sy\\u00f6tteet. Yhdess\\u00e4 Steam-sy\\u00f6tteen kanssa se on t\\u00e4ydellinen mukautettava ohjain. Koska Steam Controller toimii samoilla sy\\u00f6tteill\\u00e4 kuin Steam Deck, julkaisup\\u00e4iv\\u00e4n\\u00e4 on heti saatavilla tuhansia peleille valmiiksi luotuja yhteis\\u00f6m\\u00e4\\u00e4rityksi\\u00e4, joiden lis\\u00e4ksi voit luoda ja jakaa omia m\\u00e4\\u00e4rityksi\\u00e4si. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller ble designet med alle slags inndata for alle spill. Sammen med Steam Input er det den ultimate tilpasningsbare kontrolleren. Takket v\\u00e6re inndataparitet med Steam Deck kommer Steam Controller allerede med samfunnskonfigurasjoner for tusenvis av spill fra f\\u00f8rste dag, eller du kan lage og dele dine egne. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller \\u00e4r designad med alla inmatningsmetoder f\\u00f6r alla dina spel. Kombinerat med Steam Input \\u00e4r det den ultimata anpassningsbara kontrollen. Tack vare dess inmatningsparitet med Steam Deck levereras Steam Controller med gemenskapskonfigurationer f\\u00f6r tusentals spel fr\\u00e5n dag ett, eller s\\u00e5 kan du skapa och dela en egen. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]A Steam Controllert az \\u00f6sszes j\\u00e1t\\u00e9kodhoz sz\\u00fcks\\u00e9ges minden bevitellel tervezt\\u00fck. A Steam Bevitellel p\\u00e1ros\\u00edtva ez a legtestreszabhat\\u00f3bb j\\u00e1t\\u00e9kvez\\u00e9rl\\u0151. A Steam Deckkel egyez\\u0151 bevitel\\u00e9nek k\\u00f6sz\\u00f6nhet\\u0151en a Steam Controller az els\\u0151 napt\\u00f3l kezdve el\\u0151re fel lesz t\\u00f6ltve t\\u00f6bb ezer j\\u00e1t\\u00e9k k\\u00f6z\\u00f6ss\\u00e9gi konfigur\\u00e1ci\\u00f3j\\u00e1val, de saj\\u00e1t konfigur\\u00e1ci\\u00f3kat is l\\u00e9trehozhatsz \\u00e9s megoszthatsz. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Ovlada\\u010d Steam Controller m\\u00e1 v\\u0161echny vstupy, kter\\u00e9 by hry mohly vy\\u017eadovat, a ve spojen\\u00ed s\\u00a0rozhran\\u00edm Steam Input se jedn\\u00e1 o \\u0161v\\u00fdcarsk\\u00fd n\\u016f\\u017e mezi gamepady. A proto\\u017ee jsou ovl\\u00e1dac\\u00ed prvky shodn\\u00e9 se za\\u0159\\u00edzen\\u00edm Steam Deck, tis\\u00edce\\u00a0her budou m\\u00edt pro ovlada\\u010d Steam Controller dostupn\\u00e1 nastaven\\u00ed od prvn\\u00edho dne. N\\u011bjak\\u00e1 hra chyb\\u00ed? Chopte se toho sami! [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller a fost proiectat s\\u0103-\\u021bi ofere toate inputurile necesare pentru toate jocurile tale. \\u00cempreun\\u0103 cu Steam Input, acesta este controlerul suprem \\u00een materie de personalizare. Gra\\u021bie inputului asem\\u0103n\\u0103tor cu cel de pe Steam Deck, Steam Controller va oferi configura\\u021bii comunitare pentru mii de jocuri \\u00eenc\\u0103 din prima zi, iar totodat\\u0103 \\u00ee\\u021bi permite s\\u0103-\\u021bi creezi \\u0219i partajezi propriile configura\\u021bii. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller, t\\u00fcm oyunlar\\u0131n\\u0131z i\\u00e7in gereken t\\u00fcm girdilere sahip olacak \\u015fekilde tasarland\\u0131. Steam Girdisi ile kullan\\u0131ld\\u0131\\u011f\\u0131nda, m\\u00fckemmel bir \\u00f6zelle\\u015ftirilebilir kontrolc\\u00fc h\\u00e2line geliyor. Steam Controller, Steam Deck ile ayn\\u0131 girdileri payla\\u015ft\\u0131\\u011f\\u0131ndan, ilk g\\u00fcnden itibaren binlerce oyunun topluluk yap\\u0131land\\u0131rmalar\\u0131yla e\\u015fle\\u015ftirilebilecek. Kendi yap\\u0131land\\u0131rman\\u0131z\\u0131 da olu\\u015fturup payla\\u015fabileceksiniz. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]O Steam Controller foi projetado com todas as entradas para todos os seus jogos. Em conjunto com a Entrada Steam, n\\u00e3o h\\u00e1 controle mais personaliz\\u00e1vel que ele. \\u00a0[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam\\u00a0Controller se dise\\u00f1\\u00f3 con todas las entradas para todos tus juegos. Combinado con Steam Input, no existe un control m\\u00e1s personalizable que este. Gracias a la compatibilidad de entrada con el Steam Deck, Steam Controller podr\\u00e1 sacar provecho de configuraciones preexistentes creadas por la comunidad para miles de juegos, o bien podr\\u00e1s crear y compartir tus propias configuraciones. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller \\u0111\\u01b0\\u1ee3c thi\\u1ebft k\\u1ebf v\\u1edbi t\\u1ea5t c\\u1ea3 \\u0111\\u1ea7u v\\u00e0o c\\u1ea7n thi\\u1ebft cho \\u0111\\u1ee7 lo\\u1ea1i tr\\u00f2 ch\\u01a1i. K\\u1ebft h\\u1ee3p c\\u00f9ng Steam Input, \\u0111\\u00e2y s\\u1ebd l\\u00e0 tay c\\u1ea7m c\\u00f3 kh\\u1ea3 n\\u0103ng t\\u00f9y ch\\u1ec9nh t\\u1ed1i \\u01b0u. Nh\\u1edd s\\u1ef1 t\\u01b0\\u01a1ng \\u0111\\u1ed3ng v\\u1ec1 \\u0111\\u1ea7u v\\u00e0o v\\u1edbi Steam Deck, Steam Controller s\\u1ebd c\\u00f3 c\\u00e1c thi\\u1ebft l\\u1eadp \\u0111\\u01b0\\u1ee3c t\\u1ea1o s\\u1eb5n cho h\\u00e0ng ng\\u00e0n tr\\u00f2 ch\\u01a1i ngay t\\u1eeb ng\\u00e0y \\u0111\\u1ea7u, ho\\u1eb7c b\\u1ea1n c\\u0169ng c\\u00f3 th\\u1ec3 t\\u1ef1 t\\u00f9y ch\\u1ec9nh r\\u1ed3i chia s\\u1ebb c\\u00f9ng c\\u1ed9ng \\u0111\\u1ed3ng. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,null,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller didesain dengan semua input untuk semua game milikmu. Dipasangkan dengan Steam Input, ini menjadi kontroler terbaik yang dapat dikustomisasi. Berkat paritas inputnya dengan Steam Deck, Steam Controller menyediakan konfigurasi komunitas untuk ribuan game langsung sejak awal. Atau, kamu dapat membuat dan membagikan konfigurasimu sendiri. Input\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;],\&quot;localized_media_description\&quot;:[\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller was designed with all the inputs for all your games. Paired with Steam Input, it\\u2019s the ultimate customizable controller. Thanks to its input parity with Steam Deck, Steam Controller will be pre-populated with community configurations for thousands of games from day one, or you can make and share your own. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Der Steam Controller wurde mit allen Eingabearten f\\u00fcr alle Ihre Spiele entworfen. In Verbindung mit der Steam-Eingabe ist er der ultimativ anpassbare Controller. Dank seiner Kompatibilit\\u00e4t mit den Eingabearten des Steam Deck profitiert der Steam Controller von Beginn an von den Community-Konfigurationen f\\u00fcr Tausende Spiele. Sie k\\u00f6nnen nat\\u00fcrlich auch Ihre eigenen Konfigurationen erstellen und teilen. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Le Steam\\u00a0Controller a \\u00e9t\\u00e9 con\\u00e7u avec toutes les entr\\u00e9es pour tous vos jeux. Associ\\u00e9 \\u00e0 Steam\\u00a0Input, c'est le contr\\u00f4leur personnalisable par excellence. Gr\\u00e2ce \\u00e0 sa compatibilit\\u00e9 avec Steam\\u00a0Deck, le Steam\\u00a0Controller sera pr\\u00e9configur\\u00e9 avec des configurations cr\\u00e9\\u00e9es par la communaut\\u00e9 pour des milliers de jeux d\\u00e8s le premier jour, et vous pourrez \\u00e9galement cr\\u00e9er et partager les v\\u00f4tres. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller \\u00e8 stato progettato con tutti gli input necessari per tutti i tuoi giochi. Abbinato a Steam Input, \\u00e8 il controller personalizzabile definitivo. Grazie allo stesso numero di input di Steam Deck, per Steam Controller saranno disponibili sin dal primo giorno le configurazioni create dalla Comunit\\u00e0 per migliaia di giochi. In alternativa, puoi creare e condividere la tua configurazione. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]O Steam Controller foi criado com todos os controlos que precisas para todos os teus jogos. Juntamente com o Steam Input, \\u00e9 o comando mais personaliz\\u00e1vel de sempre. Gra\\u00e7as \\u00e0 sua paridade de input com o Steam Deck, o Steam Controller conta com configura\\u00e7\\u00f5es comunit\\u00e1rias para milhares de jogos desde o primeiro dia. Ou ent\\u00e3o, cria as tuas pr\\u00f3prias configura\\u00e7\\u00f5es e partilha-as. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller zosta\\u0142 zaprojektowany z my\\u015bl\\u0105 o wszystkich elementach sterowania dla wszystkich twoich gier. W po\\u0142\\u0105czeniu ze Steam Input to najlepszy mo\\u017cliwy kontroler pod wzgl\\u0119dem personalizacji. Dzi\\u0119ki swojej zgodno\\u015bci ze Steam Deckiem na Steam Controllerze b\\u0119d\\u0105 natychmiastowo dost\\u0119pne konfiguracje od spo\\u0142eczno\\u015bci dla tysi\\u0119cy gier. Mo\\u017cesz te\\u017c bez problemu tworzy\\u0107 i udost\\u0119pnia\\u0107 swoje w\\u0142asne. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller er designet med alle input til alle dine spil. Sammen med Steam Input er det den ultimative brugerdefinerbare controller. Takket v\\u00e6re inputparitet med Steam Deck leveres Steam Controller med f\\u00e6llesskabskonfigurationer til tusindvis af spil fra f\\u00f8rste dag, eller du kan lave og dele dine egne. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]De Steam Controller is ontworpen om je alle invoeropties voor al je spellen te bieden. In combinatie met Steam Input is het de ultieme aanpasbare controller. Dankzij de invoerpariteit met Steam Deck zijn de communityconfiguraties voor duizenden spellen vanaf het eerste gebruik al beschikbaar op de Steam Controller. Natuurlijk kun je ook je eigen configuraties maken en delen. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller on suunniteltu k\\u00e4sittelem\\u00e4\\u00e4n kaikki pelien k\\u00e4ytt\\u00e4m\\u00e4t sy\\u00f6tteet. Yhdess\\u00e4 Steam-sy\\u00f6tteen kanssa se on t\\u00e4ydellinen mukautettava ohjain. Koska Steam Controller toimii samoilla sy\\u00f6tteill\\u00e4 kuin Steam Deck, julkaisup\\u00e4iv\\u00e4n\\u00e4 on heti saatavilla tuhansia peleille valmiiksi luotuja yhteis\\u00f6m\\u00e4\\u00e4rityksi\\u00e4, joiden lis\\u00e4ksi voit luoda ja jakaa omia m\\u00e4\\u00e4rityksi\\u00e4si. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller ble designet med alle slags inndata for alle spill. Sammen med Steam Input er det den ultimate tilpasningsbare kontrolleren. Takket v\\u00e6re inndataparitet med Steam Deck kommer Steam Controller allerede med samfunnskonfigurasjoner for tusenvis av spill fra f\\u00f8rste dag, eller du kan lage og dele dine egne. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller \\u00e4r designad med alla inmatningsmetoder f\\u00f6r alla dina spel. Kombinerat med Steam Input \\u00e4r det den ultimata anpassningsbara kontrollen. Tack vare dess inmatningsparitet med Steam Deck levereras Steam Controller med gemenskapskonfigurationer f\\u00f6r tusentals spel fr\\u00e5n dag ett, eller s\\u00e5 kan du skapa och dela en egen. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]A Steam Controllert az \\u00f6sszes j\\u00e1t\\u00e9kodhoz sz\\u00fcks\\u00e9ges minden bevitellel tervezt\\u00fck. A Steam Bevitellel p\\u00e1ros\\u00edtva ez a legtestreszabhat\\u00f3bb j\\u00e1t\\u00e9kvez\\u00e9rl\\u0151. A Steam Deckkel egyez\\u0151 bevitel\\u00e9nek k\\u00f6sz\\u00f6nhet\\u0151en a Steam Controller az els\\u0151 napt\\u00f3l kezdve el\\u0151re fel lesz t\\u00f6ltve t\\u00f6bb ezer j\\u00e1t\\u00e9k k\\u00f6z\\u00f6ss\\u00e9gi konfigur\\u00e1ci\\u00f3j\\u00e1val, de saj\\u00e1t konfigur\\u00e1ci\\u00f3kat is l\\u00e9trehozhatsz \\u00e9s megoszthatsz. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Ovlada\\u010d Steam Controller m\\u00e1 v\\u0161echny vstupy, kter\\u00e9 by hry mohly vy\\u017eadovat, a ve spojen\\u00ed s\\u00a0rozhran\\u00edm Steam Input se jedn\\u00e1 o \\u0161v\\u00fdcarsk\\u00fd n\\u016f\\u017e mezi gamepady. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller a fost proiectat s\\u0103-\\u021bi ofere toate inputurile necesare pentru toate jocurile tale. \\u00cempreun\\u0103 cu Steam Input, acesta este controlerul suprem \\u00een materie de personalizare. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller, t\\u00fcm oyunlar\\u0131n\\u0131z i\\u00e7in gereken t\\u00fcm girdilere sahip olacak \\u015fekilde tasarlanm\\u0131\\u015ft\\u0131r. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller \\u0111\\u01b0\\u1ee3c thi\\u1ebft k\\u1ebf v\\u1edbi t\\u1ea5t c\\u1ea3 \\u0111\\u1ea7u v\\u00e0o c\\u1ea7n thi\\u1ebft cho \\u0111\\u1ee7 lo\\u1ea1i tr\\u00f2 ch\\u01a1i. K\\u1ebft h\\u1ee3p c\\u00f9ng Steam Input, \\u0111\\u00e2y s\\u1ebd l\\u00e0 tay c\\u1ea7m c\\u00f3 kh\\u1ea3 n\\u0103ng t\\u00f9y ch\\u1ec9nh t\\u1ed1i \\u01b0u. Nh\\u1edd s\\u1ef1 t\\u01b0\\u01a1ng \\u0111\\u1ed3ng v\\u1ec1 \\u0111\\u1ea7u v\\u00e0o v\\u1edbi Steam Deck, Steam Controller s\\u1ebd c\\u00f3 c\\u00e1c thi\\u1ebft l\\u1eadp \\u0111\\u01b0\\u1ee3c t\\u1ea1o s\\u1eb5n cho h\\u00e0ng ng\\u00e0n tr\\u00f2 ch\\u01a1i ngay t\\u1eeb ng\\u00e0y \\u0111\\u1ea7u, ho\\u1eb7c b\\u1ea1n c\\u0169ng c\\u00f3 th\\u1ec3 t\\u1ef1 t\\u00f9y ch\\u1ec9nh r\\u1ed3i chia s\\u1ebb c\\u00f9ng c\\u1ed9ng \\u0111\\u1ed3ng. [\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,null,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#ffffff\\\&quot;]Steam Controller didesain dengan semua input untuk semua game milikmu. Dipasangkan dengan Steam Input, ini menjadi kontroler terbaik yang dapat dikustomisasi. Berkat paritas inputnya dengan Steam Deck, Steam Controller menyediakan konfigurasi komunitas untuk ribuan game langsung sejak awal. Atau, kamu dapat membuat dan membagikan konfigurasimu sendiri. Steam Controller funciona bem com qualquer computador ou dispositivo que tenha instalado o Steam ou a app Steam Link. Isto inclui dispositivos com Windows, macOS e Linux, assim como tablets e dispositivos m\\u00f3veis.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller dzia\\u0142a z ka\\u017cdym komputerem osobistym lub urz\\u0105dzeniem z uruchomionym Steam lub aplikacj\\u0105 Steam Link. Obejmuje to komputery z systemami Windows, Mac i Linux oraz tablety i smartfony.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller fungerer med alle PC'er eller enheder, som har Steam eller Steam Link-appen installeret. Dette inkluderer Windows-, Mac- og Linux-PC'er samt tablets og smartphones.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]De Steam Controller werkt op elke pc en elk apparaat met Steam of de Steam Link-app. Dit geldt voor Windows-, Mac- en Linux-pc's, maar ook voor tablets en smartphones.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller toimii saumattomasti mill\\u00e4 tahansa tietokoneella tai laitteella, joka k\\u00e4ytt\\u00e4\\u00e4 Steami\\u00e4 tai Steam Link -sovellusta. Se tukee Windows-, Mac- ja Linux-tietokoneita sek\\u00e4 tabletteja ja \\u00e4lypuhelimia.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller fungerer p\\u00e5 alle datamaskiner eller enheter som kj\\u00f8rer Steam eller Steam Link-appen. Dette omfatter datamaskiner med Windows, Mac og Linux, samt nettbrett og smarttelefoner.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller fungerar med pc och enheter som k\\u00f6r Steam och Steam Link-appen. Det inkluderar Windows-, Mac- och Linux-datorer, och \\u00e4ven surfplattor och smarttelefoner.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]A Steam Controller b\\u00e1rmilyen PC-vel, illetve Steamet vagy Steam Link alkalmaz\\u00e1st futtat\\u00f3 k\\u00e9sz\\u00fcl\\u00e9kkel m\\u0171k\\u00f6dik. Ez mag\\u00e1ban foglalja a Windows, Mac \\u00e9s Linux rendszer\\u0171 sz\\u00e1m\\u00edt\\u00f3g\\u00e9peket, valamint a t\\u00e1blag\\u00e9peket \\u00e9s okostelefonokat.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Ovlada\\u010d Steam Controller se p\\u0159\\u00e1tel\\u00ed s ka\\u017ed\\u00fdm po\\u010d\\u00edta\\u010dem nebo za\\u0159\\u00edzen\\u00edm, na kter\\u00e9m b\\u011b\\u017e\\u00ed klient slu\\u017eby Steam nebo aplikace Steam Link. To znamen\\u00e1 po\\u010d\\u00edta\\u010de se syst\\u00e9mem Windows, macOS i Linux a\\u00a0tak\\u00e9 tablety a chytr\\u00e9 telefony.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller func\\u021bioneaz\\u0103 cu orice PC sau dispozitiv care ruleaz\\u0103 Steam sau aplica\\u021bia Steam Link. Controller\\u306f\\u3001Steam\\u307e\\u305f\\u306fSteam\\u30ea\\u30f3\\u30af\\u30a2\\u30d7\\u30ea\\u3092\\u5b9f\\u884c\\u3057\\u3066\\u3044\\u308b\\u3059\\u3079\\u3066\\u306ePC\\u3084\\u30c7\\u30d0\\u30a4\\u30b9\\u3067\\u52d5\\u4f5c\\u3057\\u307e\\u3059\\u3002 \\u3053\\u308c\\u306b\\u306f\\u3001Windows\\u3001Mac\\u3001Linux\\u306ePC\\u3001\\u304a\\u3088\\u3073\\u30bf\\u30d6\\u30ec\\u30c3\\u30c8\\u3084\\u30b9\\u30de\\u30fc\\u30c8\\u30d5\\u30a9\\u30f3\\u304c\\u542b\\u307e\\u308c\\u307e\\u3059\\u3002[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]O Steam Controller funciona bem com qualquer computador ou dispositivo que tenha instalado o Steam ou a app Steam Link. Isto inclui dispositivos com Windows, macOS e Linux, assim como tablets e dispositivos m\\u00f3veis.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller dzia\\u0142a z ka\\u017cdym komputerem osobistym lub urz\\u0105dzeniem z uruchomionym Steam lub aplikacj\\u0105 Steam Link. Obejmuje to komputery z systemami Windows, Mac i Linux oraz tablety i smartfony.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller fungerer med alle PC'er eller enheder, som har Steam eller Steam Link-appen installeret. Dette inkluderer Windows-, Mac- og Linux-PC'er samt tablets og smartphones.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]De Steam Controller werkt op elke pc en elk apparaat met Steam of de Steam Link-app. Dit geldt voor Windows-, Mac- en Linux-pc's, maar ook voor tablets en smartphones.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller toimii saumattomasti mill\\u00e4 tahansa tietokoneella tai laitteella, joka k\\u00e4ytt\\u00e4\\u00e4 Steami\\u00e4 tai Steam Link -sovellusta. Se tukee Windows-, Mac- ja Linux-tietokoneita sek\\u00e4 tabletteja ja \\u00e4lypuhelimia.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller fungerer p\\u00e5 alle datamaskiner eller enheter som kj\\u00f8rer Steam eller Steam Link-appen. Dette omfatter datamaskiner med Windows, Mac og Linux, samt nettbrett og smarttelefoner.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller fungerar med pc och enheter som k\\u00f6r Steam och Steam Link-appen. Det inkluderar Windows-, Mac- och Linux-datorer, och \\u00e4ven surfplattor och smarttelefoner.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]A Steam Controller b\\u00e1rmilyen PC-vel, illetve Steamet vagy Steam Link alkalmaz\\u00e1st futtat\\u00f3 k\\u00e9sz\\u00fcl\\u00e9kkel m\\u0171k\\u00f6dik. Ez mag\\u00e1ban foglalja a Windows, Mac \\u00e9s Linux rendszer\\u0171 sz\\u00e1m\\u00edt\\u00f3g\\u00e9peket, valamint a t\\u00e1blag\\u00e9peket \\u00e9s okostelefonokat.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Ovlada\\u010d Steam Controller se p\\u0159\\u00e1tel\\u00ed s ka\\u017ed\\u00fdm po\\u010d\\u00edta\\u010dem nebo za\\u0159\\u00edzen\\u00edm, na kter\\u00e9m b\\u011b\\u017e\\u00ed klient slu\\u017eby Steam nebo aplikace Steam Link. To znamen\\u00e1 po\\u010d\\u00edta\\u010de se syst\\u00e9mem Windows, macOS i Linux a\\u00a0tak\\u00e9 tablety a chytr\\u00e9 telefony.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller func\\u021bioneaz\\u0103 cu orice PC sau dispozitiv care ruleaz\\u0103 Steam sau aplica\\u021bia Steam Link. Sunt incluse computerele cu Windows, macOS \\u0219i Linux, precum \\u0219i tabletele \\u0219i telefoanele inteligente.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller, Steam veya Steam Link uygulamas\\u0131n\\u0131 \\u00e7al\\u0131\\u015ft\\u0131ran bilgisayarlar ve ayg\\u0131tlarla \\u00e7al\\u0131\\u015f\\u0131r. Buna Windows, Mac ve Linux bilgisayarlar\\u0131n yan\\u0131 s\\u0131ra tabletler ve ak\\u0131ll\\u0131 telefonlar da d\\u00e2hildir.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]O Steam Controller funciona com qualquer computador ou dispositivo que esteja rodando o Steam ou o aplicativo do Steam Link. Controller\\u306f\\u3001Puck\\u304c\\u306a\\u304f\\u3066\\u3082\\u7c21\\u5358\\u306bSteam Machine\\u3068\\u30da\\u30a2\\u30ea\\u30f3\\u30b0\\u3067\\u304d\\u307e\\u3059\\u3002 Desperta a tua Steam Machine sem te levantares do sof\\u00e1.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller z \\u0142atwo\\u015bci\\u0105 \\u0142\\u0105czy si\\u0119 ze Steam Machine bez swojego Pucka. Wybudzaj Steam Machine bez wstawania ze swojej kanapy.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller kan nemt tilknyttes til Steam Machine uden pucken. V\\u00e6k din Steam Machine uden at rejse dig fra sofaen.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]De Steam Controller kan eenvoudig aan de Steam Machine worden gekoppeld, zelfs zonder de Puck. Wek je Steam Machine zonder van de bank te komen.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller on helppo yhdist\\u00e4\\u00e4 Steam Machineen ilman puckia. Voit her\\u00e4tt\\u00e4\\u00e4 Steam Machinen lepotilasta joutumatta nousemaan sohvalta.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller kan enkelt sammenkobles med Steam Machine uten pucken. Vekk Steam Machine uten \\u00e5 reise deg fra sofaen.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller kan enkelt kopplas till Steam Machine utan pucken. V\\u00e4ck din Steam Machine utan att l\\u00e4mna soffan.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]A Steam Controller a puckja n\\u00e9lk\\u00fcl is k\\u00f6nnyen p\\u00e1ros\\u00edthat\\u00f3 a Steam Machine-nel. \\u00c9breszd fel a Steam Machine-edet an\\u00e9lk\\u00fcl, hogy felkeln\\u00e9l a kanap\\u00e9dr\\u00f3l.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Ovlada\\u010d Steam Controller lze snadno sp\\u00e1rovat se za\\u0159\\u00edzen\\u00edm Steam Machine i bez nutnosti pou\\u017e\\u00edt puk. Jak by se V\\u00e1m l\\u00edbilo probouzet za\\u0159\\u00edzen\\u00ed Steam Machine p\\u011bkn\\u011b z gau\\u010de?[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller se asociaz\\u0103 u\\u0219or cu Steam Machine, f\\u0103r\\u0103 a folosi puckul s\\u0103u. Porne\\u0219te Steam Machine f\\u0103r\\u0103 a te ridica de pe canapea.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Steam Controller, Puck olmadan Steam Machine ile kolayca e\\u015fle\\u015ftirilebilir. Perfekt for \\u00e5 spille alle ikke-VR-spill p\\u00e5 en enorm virtuell skjerm.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Infrar\\u00f6da lysdioder g\\u00f6r att Steam Controller kan sp\\u00e5ras av Steam Frame-kamerorna n\\u00e4r du \\u00e4r uppslukad av VR. Perfekt n\\u00e4r du vill spela alla dina spel som inte \\u00e4r VR p\\u00e5 en enorm virtuell sk\\u00e4rm.[\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Az infrav\\u00f6r\\u00f6s LED-ek lehet\\u0151v\\u00e9 teszik, hogy a Steam Frame kamer\\u00e1i k\\u00f6vess\\u00e9k a Steam Controllert, amikor elmer\\u00fclt\\u00e9l a virtu\\u00e1lis val\\u00f3s\\u00e1gban. Perfektn\\u00ed pro hran\\u00ed \\u201eploch\\u00fdch\\u201c her na ob\\u0159\\u00edm virtu\\u00e1ln\\u00edm pl\\u00e1tn\\u011b![\\\/color][\\\/p]\&quot;,\&quot;[p][color=\\\&quot;#0e141b\\\&quot;]Ledurile cu infraro\\u0219u permit ca Steam Controller s\\u0103 fie urm\\u0103rit de camerele c\\u0103\\u0219tii Steam Frame atunci c\\u00e2nd te aventurezi \\u00een RV.
